title: cynoglossum flaviflorum
intro: Cynoglossum flaviflorum, also known as the Yellow Tongue Flower, is a flowering plant native to China and is a member of the borage family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory and digestive issues. The Yellow Tongue Flower has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of coughs and sore throats, as well as soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum flaviflorum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its health benefits, including reducing fever and promoting overall well-being.
